Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class EqHe

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs.HypothesisReasoner
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.EqvEq<Expression>
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.EqHe
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasoner, IVersionedReasoner
Direct Known Subclasses:
Eq, He
public abstract class EqHe extends EqvEq<Expression> implements IVersionedReasoner
This class handles reasoners Eq and He.
